$description: Syntrace knowledge graph schema. Agents read this to scan files, extract nodes/edges, and build a queryable graph in-memory.

tool.note: Single file; each ### heading is a logical sub-node (tool entry)

inbox-item.note: Minimal structure; id derived from filename

related.description: Explicit relationship declared in frontmatter. Bidirectional by convention.

source.description: Origin of this node. Points backward to the episode/experiment/human that created it.

replaces.description: This decision replaces an older one. Creates a lineage chain.

references.description: Markdown links found in the ## Related section of the document body.

tagged.description: Implicit edge: two nodes sharing the same tag value are connected.

find_related.description: Find all nodes connected to a given node
find_related.method: Follow related, references, and tagged edges from the starting node. Rank by edge count.

trace_lineage.description: Trace how knowledge evolved: episode -> insight -> schema
trace_lineage.method: From an insight, follow source edges backward to episodes. From a schema file, find decisions whose related field points to it.

detect_gaps.method: For each insight: check source field is non-empty. For each decision: check related field contains at least one schema/ path. For each policy: check at least one decision references it.

cross_project.method: Scan a second Syntrace at a given path. Merge node lists. Use project: frontmatter field to disambiguate. Find shared tags across instances.
